hotspots.title: Trump’s WHCD evacuation after shooting
hotspots.blurb: A gunman opened fire near the White House Correspondents' Dinner, leading to the evacuation of Donald Trump and other officials. The incident has sparked intense debate over security protocols and political rhetoric.
hotspots.affect: This event commands disproportionate attention due to its high-profile nature, the immediate threat to a former president, and the polarized reactions it has provoked across the political spectrum.

hotspots.title: PP-Vox ‘national priority’ pacts in Spain
hotspots.blurb: The conservative People's Party (PP) and far-right Vox have formed coalition agreements in multiple Spanish regions, introducing 'national priority' policies that prioritize Spaniards over immigrants for social benefits and services.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot is charged due to its moral and ethical implications, the polarization it has caused within Spanish politics, and its potential to reshape regional governance.

hotspots.title: Fidesz’s post-Orbán parliamentary reshuffle
hotspots.blurb: Following Viktor Orbán’s decision not to take his parliamentary seat, Fidesz has undergone a significant reshuffle, with key figures stepping down and new leaders emerging to redefine the party’s strategy in opposition.
hotspots.affect: This development is highly charged due to Orbán’s long-standing dominance in Hungarian politics, the uncertainty surrounding Fidesz’s future, and the broader implications for Hungary’s political landscape.

hotspots.title: AfD’s rise and democratic backlash in Germany
hotspots.blurb: The far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) continues to gain traction in German polls, prompting debates over democratic resilience, the party’s extremist ties, and the response from mainstream political parties.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot is charged due to the AfD’s controversial policies, its growing influence in German politics, and the broader concerns about the rise of far-right movements in Europe.

hotspots.title: Meloni’s global stance amid Trump tensions
hotspots.blurb: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni’s relationship with Donald Trump has come under strain, particularly over her stance on NATO and Iran. This has sparked debates about Italy’s foreign policy and Meloni’s political future.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot commands attention due to the high stakes of Italy’s international alliances, the personal and political dynamics between Meloni and Trump, and the broader implications for European far-right movements.
